scripts.dev: if [ -n "$WORK_SPACE" ]; then npm run dev -w $WORK_SPACE; else npm run dev --workspaces --if-present; fi
scripts.build: if [ -n "$WORK_SPACE" ]; then npm run build -w $WORK_SPACE; else npm run build --workspaces --if-present; fi
scripts.start: if [ -n "$WORK_SPACE" ]; then npm run start -w $WORK_SPACE; else npm run start --workspaces --if-present; fi
scripts.lint: if [ -n "$WORK_SPACE" ]; then npm run lint -w $WORK_SPACE; else npm run lint --workspaces --if-present; fi
